summary: Tested First-time Gift / Premium Credits feature end-to-end. All 15 backend pytest cases pass (serial). Frontend welcome modal, premium toggle (enabled/disabled states), X close dismiss, claim navigation, is_new_user persistence, and credit decrement via UI generation flow all verified. Admin credentials reset (premium_credits=0, is_new_user=false) after testing per instructions.

minor.issue: Default parallel xdist config (-n 2 --dist loadscope) causes flaky failures in test_premium_credits.py because all tests mutate the same admin user's credits. Tests pass 100% with '-n 0'. Consider serializing shared-user tests via a lock/marker or per-test user creation.

action_items: Consider making shared-admin-user tests xdist-safe (e.g. use unique per-test Google user or a filelock) so default '-n 2' pytest run is stable.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 899 lines - approaching the 700-line split threshold. Consider extracting AI generation and auth into separate modules.

consume_premium_credit uses email as fallback identity for JWT users; safe here because email is unique-indexed, but leaves two write paths — recommend consolidating on user_id everywhere (backfill user_id on legacy JWT admin).
get_credits does not surface is_new_user; frontend currently reads it from /auth/me only. Consider including in /user/credits for a single source of truth.
test_credentials: admin@biblebio.com / BibleAdmin2024! (JWT email login used; Google OAuth path not re-tested per instructions)
seed_data_creation: Test seeds admin premium_credits between 0/2/3 and is_new_user true/false via mongosh in fixtures. After test run, credits reset to 0 and is_new_user=false as requested.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All feature requirements verified: (a) GET /api/user/credits returns {premium_credits, auth_provider}; (b) 402 returned when use_premium=true and 0 credits (both bio and theologian); (c) atomic $inc with premium_credits>0 guard prevents over-consumption; (d) non-premium calls (prayer, sermon, parable, devotional, story, explainer, bio use_premium=false, theologian use_premium=false) never consume credits; (e) /api/user/dismiss-welcome sets is_new_user=false; (f) WelcomeGiftModal appears only when user.is_new_user && credits>0; (g) X close and 'Try Your First Premium Bio' both dismiss + persist; (h) PremiumToggle disabled with opacity 0.6 at 0 credits, clickable showing 'N generations left' when credits>0; (i) Settings premium-credits-card + credits-count reflect live count after generation.
